stemHtml: According to the ITU, to what does the abbreviation A3E correspond?

options.a: Carrier without modulation as used by non-directional radio beacons (NDBs)
options.b: Carrier with keyed Morse code modulation as used by NDBs
options.c: Carrier with amplitude modulated Morse code as used by NDBs
options.d: Carrier with amplitude modulated speech used for communication (VHF-COM)
